title: Price's Candles - 6" Metallic Pillar Candles - Silver - Smokeless Burn - Unscented - Slow Burning - Non-Drip - Multi-Purpose
features: Fragrance Free: Our pillar candles are unscented, perfect for those who prefer a subtle aroma
Premium Quality: Made with high-quality wax for a clean, non-drip and smokeless burn
Elegant Design: Overdipped with a splendid metallic silver wax, adding a touch of sophistication
Versatile Use: Ideal for any occasion, from Christmas to weddings, and everything in between
Perfect Size: Measures 6" x 60mm, making it the perfect size for any candlestick or holder
description: Product description Price's Candles are passionate about providing high-quality, long-lasting candles. Our pillar candles are overdipped with a splendid metallic silver wax and are designed to burn for up to 40 hours! Price's silver pillar candles are made from high-quality wax to create a clean, non-drip and smokeless burn. Our unscented pillar candles are the ideal accessory and household essential. These slow burning pillar candles are perfect for Christmas, parties, Churches, weddings and many other special occasions! Our pillar candles can make any setting feel cosy and welcoming. Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials, do not leave unattended, monitor burn time, and properly dispose of remnants. This product has a clean, smokeless burn.
